formula: analytic expectation under probability 1/81 for every canonical candidate
select the unique ERM anchor in each context
mean across source domains of macro class recall from frozen source predictions
threshold source MSP at quantile 1-source_domain_balanced_BAcc; score is target fraction MSP above threshold
delta=mean uniform cross-entropy over full target set; if delta>5 use softmax(logits), else row-L1-normalize(logits+1+logits^2/2-row_min); score=L4(P)/(N*K)^(1/4)
COT per-row matched costs; threshold calibrated on source true-class costs so above-threshold fraction equals source error; score is target fraction below threshold
fit OLS Phi^-1(target_pair_agreement)=a*Phi^-1(source_pair_agreement)+b over all unordered candidate pairs; candidate score=Phi(a*Phi^-1(source_domain_balanced_BAcc)+b)
